final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing product shot for a skincare set e-commerce hero image.

Style/medium: commercial product photography, clean beauty aesthetic, photorealistic
Composition: eye-level straight-on shot, products arranged in orderly alignment on surface, medium aperture for sharp product focus with soft background falloff
Subject: skincare set (bottles, jars, tubes) with elegant minimalist packaging, clean lines, premium finishes
Scene/backdrop: frosted glass surface as base, soft-focus green foliage behind hazy morning mist, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: softbox diffused lighting from 45-degree angle, gentle highlights on product surfaces, no harsh shadows, calm and fresh morning atmosphere
Color palette: muted greens from foliage, soft whites and creams from products, frosted glass translucency, natural earth tones
Materials/textures: frosted glass matte surface with subtle light diffusion, smooth skincare packaging, delicate mist particles, soft leaf textures in background
Avoid: harsh shadows, over-saturated colors, cluttered composition, plastic-looking textures, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
